creator: tabthorpe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Florian

I have been able to build this on my 8-STABLE environment, as well as a
7/8/9/10 tinderbox.

My advice would be to update your ports tree to current, rebuild
relevant ports and try install again.


Thomas

-- 
Thomas Abthorpe		| FreeBSD Committer
tabthorpe@FreeBSD.org	| http://people.freebsd.org/~tabthorpe
